brand_identity.name: AUTOS DURAN
brand_identity.logo_concept: Minimalist 'AD' monogram, Black on White. Professional, authoritative, yet accessible.
brand_identity.archetype: The Performance Pro mixed with Swiss Clarity.
brand_identity.visual_style: High-contrast monochrome with electric blue accents. Ample whitespace, large typography, precision layouts.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-foreground border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.catalog_item: group relative bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 border border-border/50
cards.feature_card: bg-muted/50 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
cards.dashboard_stat: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-lg transition-all
inputs.search: h-14 pl-12 bg-muted/30 border-transparent hover:bg-muted/50 focus:bg-white focus:border-primary rounded-full transition-all

calculator.wrapper: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-border/50 relative overflow-hidden
calculator.slider_thumb: h-6 w-6 bg-primary border-4 border-white rounded-full shadow-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Chivo' for all Headings (h1-h3) and 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement the financing calculator with interactive sliders (use shadcn Slider).
Ensure high contrast: Black text on White background. Use primary Blue (#2563EB) only for primary actions.
The 'Apartado' (Reservation) feature must use Stripe payment flow simulation or actual integration logic if backend supports it.
Catalog filters must be sticky on desktop or a slide-over drawer on mobile.
Admin panel must be clean, data-dense (grid layout), and secured.
All prices must be formatted in MXN (e.g., $150,000 MXN).
Financing logic: 1.4% monthly interest, 40% minimum down payment.
Reservation cost: $1,000 MXN per day (max 5 days).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it solid white or very subtle light gray.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Ensure mobile responsiveness for all tables (use scroll areas).
Images must have 'object-cover' and rounded corners consistent with the card design.
